publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-08-05 21:32:36 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Subject files, reprints, course material, and correspondence relating to Fitchen's work in the Physics Dept.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor emeritus and former department chair in the Dept. of Physics, Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files, reprints, course material, and correspondence relating to Fitchen's work in the Physics Dept.

emph.ref: Series IV. China-U.S. Physics Examination and Application Program

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Douglas Fitchen papers, #14-22-3691. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
